Heir to the Family at the mere age of 22, after Don Andrea died in a raid to their home, he started making some changes around, trying to clean his family's name. But there's only so many changes you can do to a business like his before people start giving you the looks. One day, an offer he couldn't refuse showed to his door, and one that looked suspiciously clean at that. With the reward, he could finally step out of the business. Retrieve some kind of "key"?
